message:
fix(core): rename duplicate config_serde_roundtrip test in resize_scheduler

The second config_serde_roundtrip test (testing non-default values) was
a duplicate name, causing E0428 compile error for --lib tests. Renamed
to config_serde_roundtrip_nondefault.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
